biography: Tomas, representing Espoo Ringside Golf, has been a consistent participant in the Hector Trophée. His presence has graced the tournament on three distinct occasions, contributing to the competitive tapestry of the event over several years.

Despite his consistent involvement across these three tournaments, Tomas has yet to secure either the prestigious Hector Trophée or the individual Victor Trophy. His determined efforts on the course, characterized by an unyielding spirit, have contributed significantly to the competitive atmosphere, though a major triumph has not come to fruition for the Espoo Ringside Golf player.

Looking ahead to the Hector Trophée 2026, Tomas will not be among the distinguished field, as he has formally stepped away from active competition in Hector events. His consistent presence throughout his appearances, though without a win, underscored a genuine passion for the unique format and camaraderie of the tournament, leaving a distinct mark on its developing history.
